eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 6:52 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 7:52 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Washington State Patrol on behalf of the Kennewick Police Department has issued an Amber Alert for a 4-year old female named Grace Susmilch.  Grace is 3 feet 4 Inches tall, weighs 40 pounds, has blonde hair and blue eyes.   She is wearing white elastic shorts. They were last seen on Saturday, July 18th at 10:45.  She is in the company of Matthew Susmilsh, a 41-year-old male,  who is 5 feet 9 Inches, weighing 209 pounds with Brown hair and brown eyes.  There is no vehicle description available. If you have information, please call 9 1 1.
